description: The exception path for modules that cannot be activated purely self-serve. Used only for modules marked activation_type='assisted'.

flow.description: Present a clear price and scope for guided setup. Default price from pricing/tiers.json.concierge_setup.
Book a kickoff session on the internal team calendar.
Internal team completes the missing integration or policy step.
Once set up, module flips to 'instant' on future reactivation. Assisted mode is a one-time cost, not a dependency.

anti_patterns: Do not let assisted-only modules become the majority of the catalog.
If >20% of the catalog is assisted-only, the shared schema or capability model is too thin — fix the platform, not the module.
